comments.author: @laurellane1721
comments.text: This is the second 'best places' to visit in the US videos I've watched in the last week and both of them screwed up Mackinac Island, showing St. Ignace instead.  There is no bridge attaching Mackinac Island to anything.  There is no large lighthouse.  If you are going to put a video together, make sure your footage is correct.  There were some scenes of Mackinac Island but a good portion was St. Ignace which is at one end of the beautiful Mackinac Bridge with Mackinaw City at the other end.  Do better.  If you got that wrong (I've been there many many times), what else is wrong in this video?

comments.author: @EchoesOfThe50s
comments.text: I drove through all of this when I was a 19-year-old Marine in 1971... so many memories of driving through these little towns... My first trip was from California to North Carolina... only $22 wasted for the whole trip. I slept overnight at rest stops in a sleeping bag on the blockchain during the summer... luckily I wasn't eaten by mountain lions.

I’m from Kenya and I’m seriously looking for a real chance to change my life through legal opportunities in the United States.
I don’t come from a strong academic or financial background, but I refuse to give up. I’m currently learning skills and exploring real pathways like scholarships, training programs, and work/study opportunities that can help me build a better future step by step.
I’m not asking for money or shortcuts—only honest guidance from anyone who understands how someone like me can start from zero and move forward legally.
If you have real advice, experience, or opportunities, I would truly appreciate your help

comments.author: @dennismbogo8125
comments.text:
Hello everyone. I am from Kenya and I dream of moving to the United States through a legal path to study, train, or work and build a better future.
My grades were not very strong, but I am willing to work hard, learn new skills, and improve myself. I am not looking for shortcuts or scams — only honest guidance and real opportunities.
If anyone knows about scholarships, affordable colleges, training programs, sponsorship opportunities, work programs, or organizations that help international students, I would truly appreciate your advice.
I may not come from a perfect background, but I believe determination and the right guidance can change someone’s life. Thank you for reading.

comments.author: @SinaChhorn-g2u5g
comments.text:
中国外交部长王毅直接对阿努廷表示，希望泰国严厉清理网络诈骗窝点，因为泰国是诈骗枢纽。

泰国是亚洲网络诈骗的中心，同时也存在人口贩卖问题。据称有大型犯罪集团在当地藏匿活动。许多外国人，尤其是中国人，原本计划前往泰国旅游，但却遭遇绑架、勒索，甚至被转卖至缅甸。绑架勒索和人口贩卖案件几乎每天都在发生。

⚠️ 小提示：
泰国频繁发生人口贩卖、绑架勒索、诈骗、抢劫、毒品、失踪、殴打游客，甚至屠杀等案件。诈骗活动往往隐藏在宾馆、酒店、客栈、公寓、娱乐场所或高楼大厦等场所。前往泰国的人要提高警惕，否则可能会面临很大的安全风险。🇹🇭🇹🇭🇹🇭
